title: antidesma cubanum
intro: Antidesma cubanum, also known as Cuban plum or Cuban horsewood, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to the Caribbean and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antidesma cubanum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Antidesma cubanum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
